mapper.insert: INSERT INTO competition (title, description, category_id, competition_type, publisher_id, start_time, end_time, registration_start_time, registration_end_time, max_participants, fee, location, status, need_work, need_scoring) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{competitionType}, #{publisherId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{registrationStartTime}, #{registrationEndTime}, #{maxParticipants}, #{fee}, #{location}, #{status}, #{needWork}, #{needScoring})
